title: Event Venue Layout Plan
scenario: Create a venue layout plan for an event with multiple rooms, seating arrangements, and logistical requirements. The plan should include room assignments, seating charts, and logistical notes. The plan should be suitable for a conference and should accommodate 20 rooms and 100 attendees.
constraints: Must use a consistent format for room assignments and seating charts
Must include a note for logistical requirements and capacity constraints
Must include a note for emergency exits and accessibility features

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the plan adheres to the given constraints.
Check if room assignments and seating charts are accurate and complete.
Check if logistical requirements and capacity constraints are accurate and complete.
